title: armeria castellana
intro: Armeria castellana, also known as Castellana shell daisy or Castellana armeria, is a flowering plant species native to the Iberian Peninsula. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to its high content of saponins and flavonoids. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and soothing digestive issues. Armeria castellana can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
